use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};

#[derive(Deserialize, Serialize)]
struct UserConfig {
    name: String,
    email: String,
    #[serde(skip_serializing)]
    password: String,
    #[serde(skip_serializing)]
    api_key: String,
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct ServiceConfig {
    endpoint: String,
    #[serde(skip_serializing)]
    secret_token: String,
}

fn load_user(path: &str) -> Result<UserConfig, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let data = std::fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    let config: UserConfig = serde_json::from_str(&data)?;
    Ok(config)
}
